title: Windows shell extension: Office file association handler
description: Replace CollabGate double-open workaround with proper Windows file association handler. CloudMount.exe --open intercepts Office file opens on mounted drive, resolves SharePoint URL, launches ms-word:ofe|u|url.

title: CLI --open handler with path resolution and Office URI launch
Windows file association registration in registry
Improve CollabGate fallback: eliminate error message and double-open
Integration: fix mount() call site and open_file fallback for file associations
description: Two integration fixes needed after parallel workers completed:\n1. WinFspMountHandle::mount() now requires file_associations_registered parameter - call site in main.rs start_mount needs updating\n2. open_file command fallback should use get_previous_handler() from shell_integration to avoid infinite loop when CloudMount is registered as default handler

title: Fix: infinite CMD loop opening Office files outside CloudMount mounts
description: When user double-clicks an Office file outside CloudMount's mounted directory (e.g., Desktop), the --open handler fails to detect it's not a mount file and creates an infinite loop of CMD windows. Must: (1) detect non-mount paths early, (2) forward to original Office handler via saved ProgID, (3) never loop.

title: Diagnose: identify root cause of infinite loop in --open handler
Fix: guard --open handler against non-mount paths + forward to original handler
Shell integration on all platforms (replace CollabGate)
description: Replace the CollabGate blocking mechanism with proper shell integration on Linux and macOS (already done on Windows). When file associations are registered, the OS calls `cloudmount --open <path>` instead of the VFS intercepting the open. Also fix Windows passthrough bug where opening Office files outside CloudMount drives fails.

title: Linux shell integration + shared VFS infrastructure
Fix Windows passthrough bug for non-CloudMount files
Tests update + CI check
description: Full CI suite passes. Auto-formatted shell_integration.rs and core_ops.rs. All 5 CI steps green: fmt, clippy (core+desktop), build, test. 237 tests pass including 8 CollabGate tests.

title: Fix open_file infinite loop for external files on Windows
description: When opening an external file (not on a CloudMount drive) with a handled extension (.xlsx etc.), open_file loops infinitely because the env var recursion guard doesn't survive process boundaries. The guard-protected open_with_clean_env approach must be replaced: for handled extensions, use the previous handler directly or error gracefully — never fall through to OS default.

title: Fix open_file fallback logic: prevent infinite loop for handled extensions on all platforms
